gpt55_review_summary: Schrodinger reviewed the uncommitted diff with GPT-5.5 high reasoning and reported no release-blocking findings; approved merging if CI is green. Noted non-blocking gaps around separate missing-purpose permutations, direct status records, and help-text assertions.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -> 26 passed
poetry run python console-script --help sweep -> checked 30 console scripts
poetry build -> built sdist and wheel
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Strict V1 release bundles now require successful Databricks run-status evidence for the V1 benchmark, storage-reader benchmark, and native engine probe run purposes.
Kept normal Databricks run-status validation ahead of strict purpose coverage so malformed or failed status sidecars still produce precise release-readiness errors.
Updated public and legacy release-bundle CLI help text to describe benchmark/storage/engine-probe Databricks status coverage.
Added branch PR evidence and README documentation for the stricter Databricks purpose coverage gate.
why: A complete V1 release bundle should prove all target AWS g5/UC Databricks run categories completed, not just one generic successful run.
